# Nadya Post

> Personal site of Nadya Post — medical doctor (MD), software engineering manager, and health tech co-founder.

Nadya Post is co-founding Merid Health, Australia's first bulk-billed telehealth platform for women's health, starting with menopause care. She brings an unusual combination of clinical medicine, surgical research, and a decade of software engineering leadership.

## Who She Is

- **Doctor**: MD from Moscow State University of Medicine and Dentistry. Research Fellow at Oslo University Hospital, Interventional Center, Department of Hepatic Surgery.
- **Engineer & Leader**: Engineering Manager at Xero (2021–2026), leading Payroll on Mobile across Australia, New Zealand, the United Kingdom, and the United States.
- **Founder**: Co-founder of Merid Health — addressing the gap in women's healthcare access in Australia, focused on menopause care.

## Published Research

- [Margin status after laparoscopic resection of colorectal liver metastases](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24308605/) — HPB (Oxford), 2014. First author.
- [Inflammatory Response After Laparoscopic Versus Open Resection — Oslo-CoMet Trial](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26496309/) — Medicine (Baltimore), 2015.
- [Russian classification of complications in surgery](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25055544/) — Vestnik Khirurgii, 2014.
